timelineOur Process

How Investigations Work

A systematic, scientific approach to forensic engineering from initial request to expert testimony

01

Submit Request

Complete our online inspection form with incident details, location, and supporting documentation. Our team reviews your submission immediately.

  • Online form submission
  • 24/7 availability
  • Instant confirmation
send

Step 01

Submit Request

02

Assignment & Scheduling

Licensed PE engineer assigned within 24 hours. Site visit scheduled at your convenience with flexible timing options.

  • PE engineer assignment
  • Flexible scheduling
  • Preparation checklist
event

Step 02

Assignment & Scheduling

03

On-Site Investigation

Comprehensive field inspection with advanced diagnostic tools, high-resolution photography, thermal imaging, and precise measurements.

  • Advanced equipment
  • Detailed documentation
  • Evidence collection
search

Step 03

On-Site Investigation

04

Laboratory Analysis

Material testing, structural calculations, and forensic analysis in our state-of-the-art certified laboratory facilities.

  • Material testing
  • Structural analysis
  • Certified lab
science

Step 04

Laboratory Analysis

05

Expert Report

Detailed engineering report with findings, root cause analysis, professional opinions, and litigation-ready documentation.

  • Comprehensive findings
  • Root cause analysis
  • Court-ready format
description

Step 05

Expert Report

06

Litigation Support

Expert testimony, deposition preparation, case strategy consultation, and ongoing support throughout the legal process.

  • Expert testimony
  • Deposition prep
  • Case consultation
gavel

Step 06

Litigation Support

24hr
Initial Response
100%

Cases Completed
98%

What Our Clients Say

starstarstarstarstar

“Trinity Engineering provided the most thorough and defensible report we've ever received. Their expert testimony was instrumental in resolving our case.”

Sarah Mitchell
Senior Claims Adjuster, National Insurance Group
starstarstarstarstar

“The level of technical detail and clarity in their structural analysis reports is unmatched. They've become our go-to forensic engineering firm.”

Michael Chen, Esq.
Partner, Chen & Associates Law Firm
starstarstarstarstar

“Fast response, professional service, and expert analysis. Trinity Engineering has helped us resolve complex large loss claims efficiently.”

Jennifer Rodriguez
Director of Claims, Coastal Property Insurance
